resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def transformArray(self, nums: List[int]) -> List[int]:
        return sorted(0 if x % 2 == 0 else 1 for x in nums)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n log n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Map each element to 0 or 1 in one pass, then sort the resulting list of 0s and 1s. The sort is efficient because the values are only two distinct integers.
